scripts.dev:agent: cd pipecat-gateway && uv run python -m mitr_pipecat_gateway.server
scripts.start:agent: cd pipecat-gateway && uv run python -m mitr_pipecat_gateway.server
scripts.test:unit: POSTGRES_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/mitr MEM0_API_KEY=test QDRANT_URL=http://localhost:6333 node --import ./node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs --test src/config/env.test.ts src/lib/rate-limit.test.ts src/lib/short-code-hash.test.ts src/agent-worker/async-followup-manager.test.ts src/services/auth/auth-attempts.test.ts src/services/auth/auth-linking-policy.test.ts src/services/auth/password-policy.test.ts src/services/device/device-agent-lifecycle.test.ts src/services/reminders/reminder-time.test.ts src/services/elder-journey/elder-journey-types.test.ts src/services/memory/elder-context-types.test.ts src/services/memory/mem0-service.test.ts src/services/companion/satsang-ledger.test.ts src/services/insights/insights-scoring.test.ts src/services/insights/daily-digest-service.test.ts src/services/family/device-usage-summary.test.ts src/services/nudges/voice-note-encryption.test.ts
